items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking this fight on short notice.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's taking this fight on short notice.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's only real way of winning is dragging things into deep waters.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's only real way of winning fights in my opinion is by dragging things into deep waters.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is coming off of a devastating KO.
items.quote: He's coming off of a devastating KO.

items.claim: Mike Davis has good wrestling and won't be held down by Narullo Aliev.
items.quote: I like his wrestling and I don't think he's going to be held down by Narillo Ali.

items.claim: Mike Davis has a huge advantage over Narullo Aliev on the feet as a technical striker.
items.quote: on the feet, I really think Mike Davis has a huge advantage over Narulo Ali... Mike Davis is really good at standing his ground and he's a really technical striker.

items.claim: Narullo Aliev is a fighter who ducks his head down and spams overhands.
items.quote: Narulo Ali, who's just a bit of a duck his head down and spam overhands type of guy.

items.claim: Magomed Gadzhiyasulov finished pretty much everyone on the regional scene with nasty finishes.
items.quote: He's finished pretty much everyone if I'm not mistaken and they've all been really nasty finishes.
